programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Rangarang Karyakram begins, and everyone starts showing their performance.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak compliments the kids' performance that it represents the moral values of happiness.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Haseena and the others bring the hijacker in for interrogation.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Haseena is conflicted when DSP Anubhav Singh asks her to fire Billu.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Ranjit's brother-in-law agrees to help Haseena look for Ahilya.

programme.desc: Seeing Iyer and Babita together, Jethalal fantasises about dancing with Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Society faces a vegetable shortage when Sunita stops coming to the market.
